name: Aarya Kuldeep
qualifications: Certified Yoga Teacher – Quality Council of India, 2017
Master's degree in Human Consciousness and Yogic Science – Dev Sanskriti University, Haridwar, 2016
Certificate in Yoga and PhD research scholar in Yoga and Holistic Health – Indian Association of Yoga, New Delhi, 2016
Certificate in Yoga for Middle Aged – Morarji Desai National Institute of Yoga (MDNIY), New Delhi, 2015
Judge – SGFI State Yoga Championship, 2015
bio: Founder, Pragya Yog School (PhD Scholar, MSc. Yogic Science)

name: Louise
qualifications: 500 Hours of training from the International Yoga Academy – 2015
100 Hour Pre-natal Yoga Teacher Training Course from the International Yoga Academy – 2016
bio: Louise believes that yoga is for every body, regardless of age, body type, gender, or personal background. Greatly influenced by the teachings of Guruji BKS Iyengar and her main teacher Dr. Yogananth Andiappan, she sees her dharma as promoting self-love and sharing her knowledge to inspire more people to practice yoga.

name: Ashish Prajapati
qualifications: Ph.D. in Yog (Pursuing) – Lakulish Yog University, Ahmedabad, India
Master of Science in Yog – S-VYASA University, Bangalore, India
Bachelor of Science in Yog – S-VYASA University, Bangalore, India
Registered Yog Teacher (RYT 500) – Yog Alliance, USA
bio: A dedicated practitioner and educator with a wealth of knowledge and over 15 years of experience in the field of yog.

name: Dr. Rakesh Jayswal
qualifications: Doctorate in Psychology

name: Dr. Yatendra Datt Amoli
qualifications: PhD in Yoga (Kashmir Shaiva Philosophy)
Book on Kashmir Shaiva Philosophy published by Chaukhamba (India)
Appointed as ICCR chair by MEA Govt of India for establishment of first India-China Yoga College at YMU, Kunming, 2015
Worked as Associate Professor in Yoga at Dev Sanskriti University, Haridwar
bio: Dr. Yatendra Dutt Amoli did his PhD in Yoga in Kashmir Saivism — a rare culture of Tantra Philosophy. During 20 years of teaching, he has written several research papers published in journals of international repute. Featured on CGTN, CCTV and other national televisions in China.

name: Marcus
qualifications: 200-hr 4D Yoga Teacher Training in Yoga and Meditation with Kapil Rajiv – 2024
Tibetan Singing Bowl Advanced Level – Tsering Tibetan Sound Healing – 2024
3-Days Mindfulness Yin Yoga Workshop with Chris Su – 2024
50-hr Chair Yoga with TinMing Lau – 2024
bio: Marcus encourages his students to prioritize solid foundations in building strength and flexibility before seeking more advanced asana. His teaching emphasizes muscle engagement, breath awareness, and body-to-mind connection.

name: Charlotte
qualifications: 50hr Ayurveda & the Yogic Lifestyle @ Pure – 2024
65hr Prenatal and Postnatal Yoga Teacher Training @ Bliss Baby Yoga – 2022
16hr Wheel Yoga Teacher Training @ Triangel Yoga – 2022
30hr Aerial Yoga Teacher Training @ Triangel Yoga – 2022
Yin Yoga Teacher Training & Immersion @ Yoga and Ayurveda Center – 2020
20hr Yoga Ring Teacher Training @ Lazy Cat Yoga – 2019
200hr Yoga Teacher Training @ Lazy Cat Yoga – 2019
bio: Charlotte started her yoga journey in 2017. Since transitioning to full-time teaching in 2020, she has found immense joy in sharing her passion for yoga. Her class style blends mellow and dynamic elements.

name: Tavia
qualifications: Certified Mat Yoga Teacher & Aerial Yoga Teacher – US Yoga Alliance RYT 200
70 hours Advanced Aerial Yoga
20 hours Backcare Therapy, 85 hours Yoga Therapy
21 hours Anatomy Trains in Motion
Reiki Energy Healing Lv2, Tibetan Singing Bowls Therapist
Chair Yoga Instructor, Yoga Nidra
bio: Tavia has been instructing since 2019, especially Vinyasa Yoga. She began her practice to address Scoliosis and now believes yoga is about learning and rediscovering your own body through refining stances and pranayama.

name: Dr. Usha Jayswal
qualifications: PhD in Human Resource Management
bio: Dr. Usha Jaiswal is a well-known practitioner and advocate of Pranic Healing, an energy healing practice involving the manipulation of the body's energy fields. She has given numerous talks including a session at Dev Sanskriti Vishwavidyalaya.

name: Angela
qualifications: Certificate in 200-hr Yog Teacher Training, Pragya Yog School – 2023
Certificate in 50-hr Ayurveda & the Yogic Lifestyle with Pragya Yog School – 2023
Certificate in 18-hr Inversion & Arm Balancing – 2022
Certificate in 500-hr Yog Teacher Training with M. Young – 2021
bio: Angela began her yog journey in 2021. Through continuous practice, study, and self-discovery, she has committed herself to finding a balance between dynamic asana, restorative techniques, and a mindful lifestyle.
